fields.title: Implement core Autoresearch service against a fake execution boundary
fields.description: Implement the Autoresearch domain state machine before wiring real sandbox execution. This task owns replay, init and log decisions, confidence scoring, session-scoped runtime state, prompt fragments, auto-resume decisions, and the boundary interface the adapter will later satisfy.
fields.design: Add src/services/autoresearch.ts and define AutoresearchExecutionBoundary as the narrow interface the service consumes. Store runtime state in Ref<Map<sessionId, SessionRuntime>>. Implement session sync, mode on or off or clear, init, log validation, prompt fragment generation, auto-resume decisions, metric parsing helpers, and pure view data. Use fake boundary implementations in tests. The service must not import ExtensionAPI, node:child_process, or pi.exec.
